infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to camera to take photos of fishing lures for analysis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to photo library to select fishing lure images for analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Camera access may require microphone permission on some devices.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to show fishing spots, nearby lakes, local weather conditions, and region-specific fishing information. For example, when you're near Lake Simcoe, the app can recommend species, lures, and conditions relevant to that area.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location to show fishing spots, nearby lakes, local weather conditions, and region-specific fishing information. For example, when you're near Lake Simcoe, the app can recommend species, lures, and conditions relevant to that area.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses your location to show fishing spots, nearby lakes, local weather conditions, and region-specific fishing information. For example, when you're near Lake Simcoe, the app can recommend species, lures, and conditions relevant to that area.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to take photos of fishing lures for AI analysis.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your photos to select fishing lure images for analysis.
